subcodes.first_line: O dearly beloved friends! This servant reflecteth upon the blessed verse of the Qur'án which declareth: "Did ye imagine that ye would enter Paradise..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عزیز این عبد در ایه مبارکه قرآن میفرماید ام حسبتم ان تدخلوا الجنه و
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @banishments of Baha'u'llah, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
